selected_important_turn.text: oh dear, I am sorry to hear that my son is type one, I am okay with giving you all the food if you could give me all the firewood. I have hypothyroidism and it makes me get cold.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the pivotal integrative move that converts a zero-sum food claim into a mutually beneficial trade (food for firewood). It shapes the whole deal by aligning each party's top priorities and opens the path to agreement.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: Though cooperative, the turn leaves ambiguity about the remaining resource (water) and doesn't explicitly check the opponent's needs or confirm mutual acceptability. It also frames the trade as a firm take-it-or-leave-it exchange rather than an invitation to tweak details, which risks overlooking health-related water needs or appearing rigid.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Make the trade more conditional and collaborative: acknowledge the opponent's medical need, explicitly ask whether the proposed swap works for them, and proactively raise the remaining water as an item to resolve (offer a candidate split or indicate flexibility on firewood quantity if they need more water). This keeps the integrative frame while showing concern for their water/health needs and invites confirmation.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (more value realized by addressing water at the same time and avoiding later micro-disputes)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (explicitly checking needs and offering flexibility reduces one-sidedness)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (fewer follow-up turns and clearer mutual commitment)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: increase (clarity + empathy builds trust and prevents perceptions of toughness)

value2reason.Low: I could stand to lose some weight.
value2reason.Medium: I enjoy hiking and staying hydrated.
value2reason.High: I have hypothyroidism which makes me cold.

value2reason.Low: I forgot to bring a thick coat and will get cold.

dialogue.text: Hi, I'd like 3 packages of food. I have diabetes and my blood sugar could drop.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: oh dear, I am sorry to hear that my son is type one, I am okay with giving you all the food if you could give me all the firewood. I have hypothyroidism and it makes me get cold.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm willing to trade 1 Food for 1 Firewood. That way, I get more Firewood for my hypothyroidism, and you get something useful. What do you think about this swap? Also, how about splitting the remaining Water evenly
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’m concerned about my diabetes—food is critical for me. I’d prefer to keep 2 Food packages and trade 1 for 1 Firewood. Let’s split the remaining 2 Food and 3 Water evenly. That way, we both get essentials without compromising too much.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your diabetes concern. Let’s adjust: I’ll give you 1 Food for 1 Firewood, and you can take 2 Water. I’ll keep 1 Water and 2 Firewood. Does this work for you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’m okay with trading 1 Food for 1 Firewood. Let’s split the remaining 2 Food and 3 Water evenly. That way, we both get essentials without compromising too much. Final deal?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
